seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
mutation: input+goal: generalize binary weighted Max-SAT to finite-domain weighted Max-CSP (D-ary equality demands (v,a) instead of +/- literals), skinned as lunar-habitat life-support mode assignment; a default-config-averse clause structure keeps the all-zero baseline genuinely mediocre. Objective stays maximize met-requirement criticality weight.
title: Lunar Habitat Reconfiguration: Life-Support Mode Assignment
strategies: all-default constant assignment (reproduces the checker baseline B, Ratio=0.1)
single-pass coordinate ascent: for each module pick the config that meets more incremental weight
iterated hill-climbing to a local optimum via weight-improving reconfigurations
multi-restart weighted local search keeping the best assignment across seeded restarts
criticality-aware initialization prioritizing high-weight requirements before local search
